title.en: But now, how to deal with the Dark Temple?

content.en:
Daoshan Dao Ancestor's words are also what many people want to say, the corpse of the realm beast is so precious, it is natural that it must be taken.

Moreover, the Dark Temple can't be spared, who knows how many good things the Dark Temple has obtained from the inner world of the Realm Beasts? Only by destroying the Dark Temple can you obtain the treasures and resources of the Dark Temple.

But now, how to deal with the Dark Temple?

They are mainly afraid that if the Dark God Temple is desperate and destroys the Dark God Realm, the value of the beast corpse in that realm will be reduced by tens of thousands of times again, and it can even be said that it is worthless.

While many Dao Ancestors were discussing, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said: "Everyone, the person in charge of the Dark God Temple is the Lord of the Dark God Temple, if anyone has the ability to destroy the Dark God Temple, it must be the Lord of the Dark God Temple, and the Lord of the Dark God Temple is definitely unwilling to transfer all the formation authority to control the Dark God Temple to others, so as long as the Lord of the Dark God Temple is killed in an instant, the Dark God Realm will not be destroyed." "

"I can't kill the Dark God Temple Master in an instant, can you do it from the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor?"

Dao Mountain Dao Master sneered.

Although he is a Fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and the Dark God Temple Lord is only a Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, it seems that there is a big gap, but the Dark God Temple Lord must have something to protect his life, and it is estimated that he can't do it in an instant.

What's more, the Dark God Temple Lord is currently located in the Dark God Realm, and they have to enter the Dark God Realm before they can attack the Dark God Lord, otherwise if they attack outside, it will be equivalent to attacking the Dark God Realm.

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor explained: "I have a sword to slash the soul, even if I can't kill the Dark God Temple Master, I am sure to hit his heart hard, making him fall into a state of confusion in an instant, at that time, Dao Mountain Dao Ancestor and the Forbidden Hall Hall Master can kill the Dark God Realm, and it shouldn't be difficult to kill the Dark God Hall Lord in an instant." This time, we can do without the corpse of the realm beast and all the benefits, as long as we destroy the Dark Temple!"

"Oh, you want the corpse of the beast?"

The Forbidden Hall Master and the Dao Mountain Dao Lord were all very surprised.

With the power of the Void Sky One Pulse, he is currently qualified to participate and get a piece of the pie!

But the Void Heaven One Vein now doesn't want the corpse of the beast!

In fact, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor also wanted the corpse of the Boundary Beast, but he was also afraid that the four transcendent forces would join forces with the other party's Void Heaven One Vein, after all, it was the Void Heaven One Vein that prevented them from easily seeking the corpse of the Boundary Beast!

If there was no Void Heaven Pulse, the Dark Temple would have surrendered long ago.

Therefore, for the sake of safety, he didn't want the corpse of the Boundary Beast, just killed the Dark Temple.

In this way, it is very likely that the four transcendent forces will not care about the Void Heaven and One Pulse.

Soon, the five transcendent forces successfully negotiated and decided on a plan.

Distance.

The incarnation of the Dark Temple Lord didn't hear what everyone was discussing, because everyone had been talking about it all along.

However, he sensed that something was wrong, as if the four transcendent forces did not mean to threaten the Void Heaven One Pulse.

"Could it be that they really dare to forcibly attack the Dark God Realm?"

The Lord of the Dark Temple said secretly.

Right now.

A sword light pierced through everything, as if it was like a void sky, crossing the Dark God Realm.

The Dark God Realm, the interior of the Dark God Temple.

The Dark Temple Lord was controlling the Great Array, and suddenly a sword light descended as if it were nothing and formless, piercing directly into the depths of his soul.

Rumble!

The Dark Temple Lord's heart was hit hard, and the whole person was instantly confused, so naturally there was no way to control the big array.

Immediately.

The Hall Master of the Forbidden Hall and the Dao Mountain Dao Lord rushed into the Dark God Realm inside the corpse of the Boundary Beast.

A Venerable Dao Ancestor descended with him, and after entering, he killed anyone he saw.

In front of the Dark Temple.

Several Dao Ancestors of the Dark God Temple tried to stop the Forbidden Hall Lord and the Dao Mountain Dao Master, but they were easily killed, and they didn't hold on for a moment.

They were too weak, far from being able to compare with an existence like Daoshan Dao Ancestor, like ants.

In an instant, the Forbidden Hall Master and Daoshan Dao Ancestor were killed in front of the Dark God Hall Master.

I saw that Daoshan Dao Ancestor directly cast an illusion Dao technique, and immediately the two powerhouses successively used all their strength to attack.

Rumble!!!!

The body of the Dark Temple Lord was directly shattered, and although it was healed under the protection of life-saving things, it was quickly crushed and crushed again.

After a single breath, the Dark Temple Lord completely dissolved into nothingness.

Until he died, the Lord of the Dark Temple did not regain his senses, and he was still in the process of being severely traumatized, so it can be said that he died unconscious.

As soon as the Lord of the Dark Temple died, there were no more masters in the entire Dark Temple.

Immediately, the four transcendent forces were all snatching the resources of the Dark God Temple, and the Void Heaven One was chasing and killing the True Ancestors, True Monarchs, and Heavenly Monarchs of the Dark God Temple.

It can be said that the Void Heaven will not let go of even a single person in the Dark Temple.

After a long time, almost all the creatures in the Dark God Realm were killed, and only some innocent mortals remained.

Subsequently, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor immediately took the opportunity to evacuate the Dark God Realm with the Dao Ancestors under his command.

As for the division of the Dark God Realm, he is not ready to participate, and it has nothing to do with him how other forces compete.

......

Ten days later, a piece of news came out that the four transcendent forces had found many rare treasures in the Dark God Realm, and in order to compete for the authority of the Dark God Realm, they launched a small-scale battle and fell several Dao Ancestors.

But in the end, the four transcendent forces still negotiated, among which Daoshan occupied thirty percent of the interests, the Forbidden Temple occupied twenty percent of the interests, the Chaos Life Alliance occupied twenty percent of the interests, the Star Horn Clan occupied two percent of the interests, and the remaining interests were given to many top powers.

In this way, the authority of the inner world of the beast's corpse was divided.

For now, the Boundary Beast does not bring them much benefit, but as time passes, the Boundary Beast is enough to cultivate a large number of geniuses and abundant rare resources for them.

Terran.

Ye Tian heard about the situation of the corpse of the realm beast, and he also felt sorry for the Void Heaven Ancestor, but he also felt that the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor had done a lot, if the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor did not give up his interests, the four transcendent forces really might not agree to attack the Dark God Temple.

Besides, there are so many opportunities in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and there is really not necessarily a lack of opportunities for the corpse of a realm beast.

Still, he underestimated the corpse of the beast.

At this moment, the bloody general summoned him.

-----------------

The Wind King's Small Realm.

Ye Tian came in and saw the bloody general.

Moreover, he also met with other generals, almost all of whom came here.

Dozens of generals gathered, what a big deal.

"Bloody generals are good, generals are good!"

Ye Tian greeted.

"General Jiuji is polite!"

Many generals smiled slightly.

Immediately, Ye Tian asked, "General Bloody, what happened this time?"

The bloody general smiled and said, "Our Black Wind Mountain's own work is coming!"

"What kind of job?" Ye Tian was curious.

"Robbery!" laughed a straight-talking general.

"Robber, who are you robbing?" Ye Tian was curious.

"Rob the Liuli Sect!" "You should have heard of the corpse of the Boundary Beast, the value of the living Boundary Beast is very high, but the value of the dead Boundary Beast is also very high. Among them, the most valuable treasure is the boundary stone, but I obtained through a special channel that there are no boundary stones in the corpse of the boundary beast. Through my investigation, I learned that the Liuli Sect had taken all the boundary stones from the Dark Temple in advance, so we had to snatch the boundary stones back. "

"Boundary Stone, what's the use of that thing?" Ye Tian wondered.

The Bloody General explained: "The Boundary Stone is a kind of stone formed by the escape and condensation of the origin of the Boundary Beast after its death, it can be used to improve a person's talent, and it can easily raise a talent to the super god level. It is not difficult for some ordinary talents to be promoted to the super god level, and there are many substitutes. However, there are many rare special talents, it is too difficult to be promoted to the super god level, such as the most useful comprehension talent, how difficult it is to be promoted to the super god level, but only one boundary stone can raise the comprehension talent to the super god level! Geniuses with super god-level comprehension talents can almost all become more demonic top geniuses! You can imagine that once you have a large number of boundary stones, what genius can't be cultivated?"

"What, the boundary stone can raise any talent to the super god level!!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

His copying talent must also find someone with a super god-level talent before he can copy a super-god-level talent, and there is no way to easily raise a talent to a super-god-level.

To a certain extent, the Boundary Stone is better than copying talent.

Of course, there are many abilities to copy talents, and it is easy to copy other people's talents, and you can also fuse talents, but the boundary stone is far from being able to do this.

But even so, the value of the boundary stone is very unheavenly.

It's no wonder that Black Wind Mountain was moved and wanted to rob the Liuli Sect.

"General Jiuji, we must go to the Liuli Sect immediately, otherwise the other Upper Triple Heaven forces will also immediately enter the Liuli Sect when they hear the news, and we will not be able to take advantage of it at that time!"

The bloody general urged.

"I'm ready to go!"

Ye Tian said.
